query:
ALTER TABLE plans 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS validityType ENUM('minutes', 'hours', 'days') DEFAULT 'days',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS validityValue INT DEFAULT 30,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS validityStartFrom ENUM('first_login', 'card_creation') DEFAULT 'first_login',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS simultaneousUse INT DEFAULT 1,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sessionTimeout INT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS idleTimeout INT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS poolName VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mikrotikRateLimit VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mikrotikAddressPool VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS serviceType ENUM('pppoe', 'hotspot', 'vpn', 'all') DEFAULT 'all';
